components.name: is_network_failure
components.purpose: Detect transient network errors from failure_reason field

components.name: test_module_expansion
components.purpose: Comprehensive validation of network error detection

patterns_discovered.name: network_error_pattern_matching
patterns_discovered.description: Case-insensitive substring matching against predefined error keywords

patterns_discovered.name: defensive_null_handling
patterns_discovered.description: Early return pattern for Option type
patterns_discovered.implementation: let Some(ref reason) = failure_reason else { return false; }

patterns_discovered.name: case_insensitive_comparison
patterns_discovered.benefit: Handles error message variations in capitalization

patterns_discovered.name: comprehensive_test_coverage
patterns_discovered.description: Multiple positive/negative test cases with varied error messages

gotchas_discovered.description: Relies on exact substring matching; error messages from different sources/libraries may vary
gotchas_discovered.example: Different libraries may format 'connection timed out' as 'connection timeout' or 'timeout on connect'

gotchas_discovered.description: Adding new network error patterns requires code modification and recompilation
Only covers 502, 503, 504; missing 429 (rate limit) and 408 (request timeout)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Rate limiting may not be recognized as transient network failure

gotchas_discovered.description: Error messages in non-English locales will not match English pattern strings
'timed out' pattern could match non-network timeouts
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Unlikely in practice but could cause false positives

approach_outcome.notes: Function is well-designed with clear semantics and extensive test validation

recommendations.suggestion: Add HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) and 408 (Request Timeout) to recognized error patterns
recommendations.rationale: These are common retryable network scenarios not currently covered

recommendations.suggestion: Extract error patterns into a constant array/configuration for easier updates
recommendations.rationale: Reduces code duplication and makes pattern maintenance less error-prone

recommendations.suggestion: Add documentation comment explaining why each pattern category is included
recommendations.rationale: Helps future maintainers understand the retry logic design intent

recommendations.suggestion: Consider adding fuzzing tests with real error messages from various libraries (curl, reqwest, hyper)
recommendations.rationale: Would identify actual error message variations in the wild

recommendations.suggestion: Consider regex-based pattern matching for more flexible error detection
recommendations.rationale: Would handle variations in error message formatting more robustly
